privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a Compliance Analysis record in Eramba GRC for PCI-DSS v4.0 Requirement 6.3.3 (critical patch installation within one month of release). The record must be marked as 'Not Compliant' with a description including: average deployment time of 47 days (exceeding the 30-day SLA), compensating controls (network segmentation and enhanced IDS monitoring), and target compliance date of Q2 2025. All required keywords ('30-day SLA', '47 days', 'compensating controls', 'network segmentation', 'Q2 2025') are correctly specified in the metadata and task description.
